name: Varunprasaath R. Selvaraju, Ph.D.
summary: PhD Chemist with 6+ years of experience in process development, polymer chemistry, and materials characterization. Expertise in developing and optimizing chemical processes for polymer systems, applying statistical methods (DOE, SPC), and characterizing materials using FT-IR, thermal analysis (TGA, DSC), and chromatographic techniques. Strong background in coatings, thin-film materials, and structure-property relationships. Proven track record managing laboratory operations and supporting process scale-up activities.

education.details: Dissertation: Modular Design and Electrochemical Properties of Xanthene-Based Electrochromic Materials

education.degree: B.S. (Research), Major: Chemistry; Minor: Materials Science

bullets: Lead chemical process development and optimization for bio-based polymer systems using statistical experimental design (DOE).
Establish process specifications and quality control methods for scale-up activities.
Co-led process development for molecular thin-film coatings, developing surface preparation protocols and CVD-based deposition strategies.
Characterized coating properties using FT-IR, ellipsometry, and thermal analysis to optimize process conditions.

skills.Process Development: Process optimization, DOE, SPC, scale-up support, CVD processes
skills.Polymer & Coatings: Polymer chemistry, thin-film coatings, surface functionalization, structure-property relationships
skills.Analytical Methods: FT-IR, TGA, DSC, HPLC, GPC, ellipsometry

projects.title: Bio-based Polymer Process Development
projects.description: Led chemical process development for novel bio-based polymer systems using statistical experimental design.

projects.title: AFOSR Defense Coatings Program
projects.description: Co-led process development for high-performance molecular thin-film coatings for defense optical applications.

publications: Ramasamy Selvaraju, V.; Venta, R.; Rajapaksha, I.; Zhang, J.; Barlow, S.; Salman, S.; Scott, C.; Marder, S. "Narrow-Band Electrochromism of a Ferrocene-Substituted Rhodamine B." Chemistry of Materials, 2025, 37, 5558–5568.

Mandal, J.; Ramasamy Selvaraju, V.; Yan, W.; Divandari, M.; Spencer, N. D.; Dubner, M. "In Situ Monitoring of SI-ATRP Throughout Multiple Reinitiations Under Flow by Means of a Quartz Crystal Microbalance." RSC Advances, 2018, 8, 20048–20055.
